from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an astronaut (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent English sentence.  Each predicate is rendered with a small, human‑readable
    phrase; unknown predicates fall back to a generic “subject predicate object” format.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple mapping from predicate to a readable verb/phrase.
    _phrase_map = {
        "almaMater": "graduated from",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "birthName": "was originally named",
        "birthPlace": "was born in",
        "dateOfRetirement": "retired in",
        "occupation": "worked as",
        "status": "has status",
        "timeInSpace": "spent",
        "mission": "participated in mission",
        "selectedByNasa": "was selected by NASA in",
        "deathDate": "died on",
        "nationality": "is a citizen of",
        "servedAsChiefOfTheAstronautOfficeIn": "served as Chief of the Astronaut Office in",
        "title": "held the title of",
        "ribbonAward": "received the ribbon award",
        "operator": "was operated by",
        "backupPilot": "had backup pilot",
        "commander": "was commanded by",
        "crewMembers": "had crew members",
        "representative": "had representative",
        "alternativeName": "also known as",
        "awards": "received",
        "fossil": "has fossil",
        "senators": "has senators",
        "part": "is part of",
        "partsType": "has parts type",
        "higher": "is higher than",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "bird": "has bird",
        "leader": "has leader",
        "affiliation": "is affiliated with",
        "competeIn": "competes in",
        "president": "has president",
        "award": "received award",
        "deathPlace": "died in",
        "gemstone": "has gemstone",
        "mascot": "has mascot",
        "cosparId": "has COSPAR ID",
        "utcOffset": "has UTC offset",
    }

    # Helper to clean object strings (remove surrounding quotes)
    def _clean(obj: str) -> str:
        return obj.strip().strip('"').strip("'")

    # Group triples by their subject to enable compact sentences
    from collections import defaultdict
    subj_map = defaultdict(list)
    for triple in triples:
        subj_map[triple.subject].append((triple.predicate, triple.object))

    sentences = []
    for subj, pred_objs in subj_map.items():
        parts = []
        for pred, obj in pred_objs:
            obj_clean = _clean(obj)
            phrase = _phrase_map.get(pred)
            if phrase:
                # Special handling for timeInSpace to add unit if missing
                if pred == "timeInSpace" and not any(unit in obj_clean.lower() for unit in ["minute", "hour", "day"]):
                    obj_clean = f"{obj_clean} minutes"
                parts.append(f"{phrase} {obj_clean}")
            else:
                parts.append(f"{pred} {obj_clean}")
        # Combine parts for this subject
        if len(parts) == 1:
            sentence = f"{subj} {parts[0]}"
        else:
            sentence = f"{subj} " + ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
        sentences.append(sentence)

    # Combine sentences for different subjects
    if len(sentences) == 1:
        final = sentences[0] + "."
    else:
        final = "; ".join(sentences) + "."
    return final

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
